focus_points: Corrected verification-debt review: authorized inputs are the dispatch markdown plus every path listed in its Authorized Evidence Index section.
You must inspect the evidence index and bounded package before returning a finding; do not return dispatch-only findings.
Classify deterministic audit heuristic signals versus actual closure blockers.
Check whether current open blockers are explicit and whether any hidden closure debt remains after the worker/test-quality follow-up.
goal: Determine whether RR-AUTH-01 has remaining hidden verification debt after the worker/test-quality follow-up and evidence-bearing package refresh.
